prompt:
A photorealistic 1:1 lifestyle photograph: a fit man in his early 30s in a sunlit home gym, post-workout, light sweat on his brow and on the chest of his fitted heather-grey training tee. He sits casually on a wood bench with one elbow on his knee, popping ONE dark sugar-dusted sea moss gummy CUBE into his mouth — caught mid-action with the gummy just past his lips, his other hand resting on a stainless-steel water bottle. Next to him on the bench, clearly visible: the JAR from the provided reference image — a black plastic jar with bold teal/cyan and yellow accents, front label reading 'DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies, TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE, 60 GUMMIES, DIETARY SUPPLEMENT', side panel 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend' in a vertical teal strip, lid off. A few additional dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES sit loose on the bench beside the jar. The jar must be a faithful match of the reference image — same shape, same label artwork, fully legible.

Home gym background: clean modern setup — light-oak floor, a folded yoga mat, a kettlebell in soft focus behind him, a pair of dumbbells in a wooden rack, a large window on the left bathing the scene in late-afternoon sunlight. Shallow depth of field with gentle bokeh on the gym equipment.

Lighting: golden hour sidelight from the left, soft falloff to shadow on the right, warm-toned color grade with cool blue rim-light catching his shoulder and the back of the jar. Editorial men's wellness campaign feel — Hims / Roman / Athletic Greens quality, masculine but warm, NOT cheesy stock.

Framing: square 1:1, three-quarter portrait — man visible from waist up, hand-to-mouth in the upper-third near his face, jar prominent in the lower-third on the bench. Both subject and product clearly recognizable.

Style: hyper-realistic photography, 50mm look, f/2.2 shallow depth, natural skin texture and stubble, realistic sweat sheen, no AI artifacts, no extra fingers, gummy clearly held between thumb and index.
